pi_items.source: Calculated using IEEE 555 Timer formula: Th = 0.693 × (R1 + R2) × C = 0.693 × 57000 × 0.00001 = 0.39501 seconds = 395.01 ms
Calculated using IEEE 555 Timer formula: Tl = 0.693 × R2 × C = 0.693 × 47000 × 0.00001 = 0.32571 seconds = 325.71 ms
Task specification for acceptable margin of error in calculations
Specified in task.json and referenced in export_result.sh script

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic calculation task for a 555 Timer Astable circuit. All metadata values are correctly calculated using standard IEEE 555 Timer formulas. With component values R1=10kΩ, R2=47kΩ, and C=10μF, the expected outputs are: Frequency=1.38 Hz, Duty Cycle=54.81%, Time High=395.01 ms, Time Low=325.71 ms. The task requires an agent to use the real Electrical Engineering Calculations app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations, available on Google Play Store) to input these component values and record the calculated results to /sdcard/555_timer_results.txt with 5% tolerance. All verifiable metadata claims have been independently confirmed through direct calculation and web search verification of the app existence and 555 Timer formulas.
